examples: In a backhanded way, I think a lot of my energy and strength comes from my campaigning.
Saying she's improved comes over as a backhanded compliment.
They gave me a backhanded compliment when they said I was smart for a girl.
Stepan then sent a backhanded pass out front to Clowe, who knocked it in.
Once again, almost as a backhanded compliment, the home fans burst into their Brodeur chant.
